query_template:
SELECT
  o.patient_id AS patient_id,
  o.order_no AS order_no,
  o.order_date AS order_date,
  o.patient_name AS patient_name,
  o.patient_no AS patient_no,
  o.drug_code_sc AS drug_code_sc,
  o.drug_code AS drug_code,
  o.drug_name AS drug_name,
  o.note1 AS note1,
  o.note2 AS note2,
  o.inject_time AS inject_time
FROM vw_chemo_guidance_orders o
WHERE o.order_date = ?
ORDER BY o.patient_id, o.order_no
